# Advice Note

## Instructions

Counsel has supplied a short authority packet for a synthetic private company seeking a board-process note.

## Summary

On the supplied material, directors should document the purpose of the decision, the information reviewed, any declared interests, and the reason for the final approval.

## Analysis

The supplied authority packet identifies the directors' process duties and requires a record showing that relevant factors were considered. The proposed minute template supports that process by separating attendance, materials reviewed, conflicts, discussion, and resolution.

## Drafting Limits

This note does not assess facts outside the authority packet and should not be used as external legal advice.
